title: Important Update: GST Appellate Tribunal Appeal Filing Deadline Extended to July 31, 2026
content:
# Important Update: GST Appellate Tribunal Appeal Filing Deadline Extended to July 31, 2026

Ek important update hai. Government ne Goods and Services Tax Appellate Tribunal (GSTAT) mein appeals file karne ki last date ko extend karne ka announce kiya hai.

Here are the key details you need to know:

*   **Old Due Date:** The previous deadline for filing appeals before the GSTAT was June 30, 2026.
*   **New Due Date:** The last date for filing appeals has now been extended to **July 31, 2026**.
*   **Applicability:** This extension is for appeals filed under Section 112(1) read with Section 112(3) of the Central Goods and Services Tax (CGST) Act, 2017.
    *   Specifically, for appeals against orders communicated before May 1, 2026, the new deadline is July 31, 2026. For orders communicated on or after May 1, 2026, the appeal must be filed within three months from the date of communication as per Section 112(1).
    *   Similarly, for applications relating to orders passed before February 1, 2026, the deadline is July 31, 2026. For orders passed on or after February 1, 2026, applications must be filed within six months from the date of the order under Section 112(3).
*   **Reason for Extension:** The extension has been granted due to technical difficulties experienced on the GSTAT portal, which arose from a significant rush in filings as the previous deadline approached.
*   **Official Notification:** This extension is brought about by Notification S.O. 3502(E) dated June 30, 2026, which supersedes the earlier Notification No. S.O. 4220(E) dated September 17, 2025.

Taxpayers are advised to file their appeals well in advance to avoid any last-minute technical glitches.

## Read the Official Document
*   [Download the Official Notification/Circular here](https://egazette.nic.in/WriteReadData/2026/273941.pdf)

*Published on: 30 June 2026*
